message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor Administrator

participant ":Main UI" as MainUI
participant ":ImportReadingsFromFileUI" as UI
participant ":ImportReadingsFromFileController" as Controller
participant ":ListOfGeographicArea" as ListGA
participant "reader:XmlReader" as Reader

Administrator <- UI : Request file path
Administrator --> UI : file path

UI -> Controller : addReadingsToSensors(reader,path)
Controller -> Reader : importReadingsOfSensor(path)
Controller <-- Reader : listOfReadingsDto
Controller -> ListGA : getAllSensors( )
Controller <-- ListGA : listOfAreaSensors
Controller -> Controller : setReadingsBySensorIDescription( )

UI <-- Controller : number of lines added
Administrator <-- UI : number of lines added

@enduml
```
